$schema_note: P2-LG1-DEMO-SLO-CARVEOUT Grafana panel skeleton — per spec docs/execution_plan/2026-05-21--p2_lg1_demo_slo_carveout_spec.md §5. Datasource UID placeholder ${DS_PG} 留 runtime deploy 時 operator/E1 binding。
title: H0 Gate Latency Distribution (P2-LG1-DEMO-SLO-CARVEOUT)

targets.rawSql: SELECT recorded_at_ms AS time, p50_us AS value FROM learning.healthcheck_run WHERE check_name='h0_latency_distribution' AND engine_mode='$engine_mode' ORDER BY recorded_at_ms DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: H0 p99 latency (μs) — $engine_mode
panels.description: WARN threshold: p99 > 1000μs over 1h rolling (spec §6.1 H0_P99_WARN)

targets.rawSql: SELECT recorded_at_ms AS time, p99_us AS value FROM learning.healthcheck_run WHERE check_name='h0_latency_distribution' AND engine_mode='$engine_mode' ORDER BY recorded_at_ms DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT recorded_at_ms AS time, p999_us AS value FROM learning.healthcheck_run WHERE check_name='h0_latency_distribution' AND engine_mode='$engine_mode' ORDER BY recorded_at_ms DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: H0 max latency (μs) — $engine_mode
panels.description: WARN: max > 5000μs / FAIL: max > 10000μs over 1h rolling (spec §6.1 H0_MAX_WARN / H0_MAX_FAIL)

targets.rawSql: SELECT recorded_at_ms AS time, max_us AS value FROM learning.healthcheck_run WHERE check_name='h0_latency_distribution' AND engine_mode='$engine_mode' ORDER BY recorded_at_ms DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: H0 latency distribution 30d — $engine_mode (log-scale μs)
panels.description: p50/p99/p999/max time-series 30d heatmap, log-scale Y; per spec §5.3 panel 5

targets.rawSql: SELECT recorded_at_ms AS time, p50_us AS p50, p99_us AS p99, p999_us AS p999, max_us AS max FROM learning.healthcheck_run WHERE check_name='h0_latency_distribution' AND engine_mode='$engine_mode' AND recorded_at_ms > extract(epoch from now() - interval '30 days') * 1000 ORDER BY recorded_at_ms

_alert_rules_inline_comment: Alert rules NOT embedded in panel JSON — managed separately via Grafana alert rules API or helper_scripts/db/audit/h0_latency_alert_eval.py (spec §6.3). 邊界: H0_P99_WARN p99>1000μs 1h / H0_MAX_WARN max>5000μs 1h / H0_MAX_FAIL max>10000μs 1h.
